name: ExtensionResearchStudy_Version
title: R5: The business version for the study record (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ResearchStudy.version` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ResearchStudy.version` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ResearchStudy.version` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ResearchStudy.version` has a context of ResearchStudy based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ResearchStudy`.
Element `ResearchStudy.version` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
